chapter_title.en: The Limits of Ablution, Its Order and Reward

text: 107 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «وَ إِنْ نَسِيتَ حَتَّى تَقُومَ مِنَ اَلصَّلاَةِ فَلاَ آمُرُكَ أَنْ تُعِيدَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.107 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"And if you forget (to rotate your ring in ablution) until you stand in Salat, then I do not command you to repeat it (Salat)."
